next_steps: Open the ui_url from deploy output (default http://<ip>:4000/ui).
Create virtual API keys in the admin UI for downstream apps.
Point consumers (Hermes, Open WebUI, n8n) at http://<ip>:4000/v1 with a virtual key or master key.
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/litellm-a.json from query --live.
